content.text: The system shall display the Efficiency Analytics module when the user navigates to the Efficiency Analytics page.
the user navigates to the Efficiency Analytics page
the system shall display the Efficiency Analytics module.
The system shall display navigation tabs including Pallet Efficiency, Fleet efficiency, Environment Efficiency, and Trend & Insights.
I can switch between efficiency views
the system shall display Pallet Efficiency, Fleet Efficiency, Environment Efficiency, and Trend & Insights tabs.
The system shall highlight the Fleet Efficiency tab when it is selected.
the selected tab to be highlighted
the user selects Fleet Efficiency tab
the system shall highlight the Fleet Efficiency tab.
The system shall display a KPI cards at the top of the Fleet Efficiency dashboard.
see KPI cards at the top
I can quickly understand key metrics
the Fleet Efficiency dashboard is loaded
the user views the top section
the system shall display KPI cards.
The system shall display a KPI card labelled “MHE Utilization.”
the system shall display “MHE Utilization” card.
The system shall display under-utilization and over utilization percentages within the MHE Utilization card.
the MHE Utilization card is displayed
the system shall display under-utilization and over-utilization percentages.
The system shall display a KPI card labelled “Fleet Idle Time.”
the system shall display “Fleet Idle Time” card.
The system shall display the total fleet idle time value in hours within the Fleet Idle Time card.
the Fleet Idle Time card is displayed
the system shall display total idle time in hours.
The system shall display a KPI card labelled “Deadhead Travel Time.”
the system shall display “Deadhead Travel Time” card.
The system shall display the deadhead travel percentage value within the Deadhead Travel time card.
the Deadhead Travel Time card is displayed
the system shall display deadhead travel percentage.
The system shall display a KPI card labelled “Fleet Balance Index.”
the system shall display “Fleet Balance Index” card.
The system shall display the fleet balance index percentage value within the Fleet balance index card.
the Fleet Balance Index card is displayed
the system shall display percentage value.
The system shall display a Fleet Efficiency Distribution panel within the Fleet Efficiency analytics dashboard.
see the Fleet Efficiency Distribution panel
the user scrolls or views content
the system shall display the Fleet Efficiency Distribution panel.
The system shall display the title “Fleet Efficiency Distribution” at the top of the panel.
the system shall display “Fleet Efficiency Distribution”.
The system shall display a legend indicating different MHE types, including Diesel Forklift, Order Picker, Stacker, and VNA Truck.
the system shall display Diesel Forklift, Order Picker, Stacker, and VNA Truck.
The system shall represent each MHE type in the legend using distinct colour indicators corresponding to the markers displayed on the chart.
different colours for each MHE type
the system shall display distinct colour indicators for each MHE type.
The system shall display a two-axis performance chart visualizing fleet efficiency distribution.
the system shall display a two-axis performance chart.
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “Utilization (%)”.
the system shall label it as “Utilization (%)”.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Pallets Moved Per Hour”.
see pallets per hour on Y-axis
the system shall label it as “Pallets Moved Per Hour”.
The system shall plot individual MHE data points on the chart based on utilization percentage and pallets moved per hour metrics.
see MHE data points plotted on the chart
I can analyze utilization vs productivity
the system shall plot MHE data points based on utilization % and pallets moved per hour.
The system shall display each MHE as a circular marker positioned according to its utilization percentage (X-axis) and productivity value (Y-axis).
I can identify individual equipment performance
the system shall display circular markers positioned by utilization (X-axis) and productivity (Y-axis).
The system shall colour - code the markers based on the MHE type defined in the legend.
the system shall colour-code markers based on MHE type as per legend.
The system shall display a trend curve representing the general efficiency distribution pattern across the fleet.
the system shall display a trend curve representing efficiency distribution.
The system shall display a red vertical dashed reference line representing the lower utilization threshold for underutilized equipment.
the system shall display a red vertical dashed line for lower utilization threshold.
The system shall display a green vertical dashed reference line representing the optimal utilization threshold for efficient fleet operation.
the system shall display a green vertical dashed line for optimal utilization threshold.
The system shall classify MHE performance status into categories such as Underutilized, Optimal, or Overutilized based on utilization thresholds.
the system shall classify MHE as Underutilized, Optimal, or Overutilized.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over an MHE marker on the chart.
the user hovers over a marker
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the status of the selected MHE (e.g., Underutilized) within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a marker
the system shall display MHE status (e.g., Underutilized).
The system shall display the MHE Name within the tooltip when hovering over a marker.
the system shall display MHE name.
The system shall display the MHE Type within the tooltip when hovering over a marker.
the system shall display MHE type.
The system shall display the productivity value (pallets per hour) of the selected MHE within the tooltip.
the system shall display pallets per hour value.
The system shall visually highlight the marker when the user hovers over it to improve readability of the selected data point.
I can easily identify selected data
the user hovers over a marker
the system shall visually highlight the marker.
The system shall display the tooltip near the hovered marker without obstructing other chart elements.
the user hovers over a marker
the system shall position tooltip near marker without obstructing other elements.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the Fleet Efficiency Distribution data by clicking the refresh icon displayed in the panel header.
the user clicks the refresh icon
the system shall reload Fleet Efficiency Distribution data.
The system shall dynamically update the chart visualization when new fleet efficiency data is retrieved.
the system shall update the chart visualization.
The system shall display a panel titled “MHE Utilization Distribution” within the Efficiency Analytics dashboard.
the system shall display “MHE Utilization Distribution” panel.
The system shall display a legend identifying utilization categories including Under-utilised, Efficient, and Over Utilised.
the system shall display Under-utilised, Efficient, and Over Utilised categories.
The system shall represent each utilization category in the legend using distinct colour indicators corresponding to the chart segments.
the system shall represent each utilization category using distinct colours.
The system shall display a bar chart representing the utilization distribution across different MHE types.
see a bar chart of utilization distribution
the system shall display a bar chart representing utilization distribution
The system shall display the X-axis labelled “MHE” representing the different material handling equipment types.
the system shall label it as “MHE”.
The system shall display the Y-axis labelled “Utilization Distribution.”
the system shall label it as “Utilization Distribution”.

42.title: View Bars for Each MHE Type

content.text: The system shall display individual vertical bars representing each MHE type such as Aisle Master, BOPT, Diesel Forklift, Electric Forklift, Electric Pallet Jack, Order Picker, Reach Truck, Stacker, and VNA Truck.
see bars for each MHE type
the system shall display vertical bars for each MHE type
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over an MHE distribution bar.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the MHE type name within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display the MHE type name.
The system shall display the percentage of Over Utilised equipment for the selected MHE type within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display Over Utilised percentage.
The system shall display the percentage of Efficient equipment for the selected MHE type within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display Efficient percentage.
The system shall display the percentage of Under-utilised equipment for the selected MHE type within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display Under-utilised percentage.
The system shall visually highlight the selected bar segment when the user hovers over the corresponding MHE category.
I can easily identify selected data
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall highlight the selected bar segment.
The system shall display the tooltip adjacent to the hovered bar without obstructing other chart elements.
the system shall display tooltip adjacent to the bar without obstructing elements.
The system shall display a refresh icon in the top-right corner of the MHE Utilization Distribution panel.
the user views the top-right corner
the system shall display a refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the utilization distribution data by clicking the refresh icon.
the user clicks the refresh icon
the system shall reload utilization distribution data.
The system shall dynamically update the MHE utilization distribution chart when refreshed data is retrieved.
the system shall update the chart visualization.
The system shall display a panel titled “Operator Efficiency Table” within the Efficiency Analytics module.
the Efficiency Analytics module is displayed
the system shall display “Operator Efficiency Table”.
The system shall display a subtitle describing the section as “Operator performance and productivity metrics.”
the system shall display “Operator performance and productivity metrics”
The system shall display a table containing operator efficiency data.
see a table of operator efficiency data
the system shall display a table with operator efficiency data.
The system shall display the following columns in the Operator Efficiency Table: Operator, Idle-with-Load (min), and Deadhead %.
the system shall display columns: Operator, Idle-with-Load (min), Deadhead %.
The system shall display each operator’s name within the Operator column.
the system shall display operator names.
The system shall display a circular efficiency indicator beside each operator’s name representing the operator’s efficiency percentage.
see a circular efficiency indicator for each operator
the Operator Efficiency Table is displayed
the system shall display a circular efficiency indicator beside each operator.
The system shall display the numeric efficiency percentage value inside the circular indicator.
see numeric efficiency inside the indicator
the system shall display numeric percentage inside the circle.
The system shall display the efficiency percentage text below the Operator name. (E.g. 100% efficiency)
see efficiency text below operator name
the user views the name section
the system shall display efficiency text (e.g., 100% efficiency).
The system shall display the Idle-with-Load time in minutes for each operator within the Idle-with-Load (min) column.
the system shall display time in minutes.
The system shall display the Deadhead travel percentage for each operator within the Deadhead % column.
the system shall display percentage value.
The system shall display each operator’s efficiency indicator using visual progress styling representing the efficiency value.
the system shall represent efficiency using progress styling.
The system shall display rows in the table corresponding to individual operators currently available in the dataset.
I can review all available data
the system shall show rows for each operator.
The system shall display a refresh icon in the top-right corner of the Operator Efficiency Table panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the operator efficiency data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload operator efficiency data.
The system shall dynamically update the Operator Efficiency Table when refreshed data is retrieved.
the system shall update the Operator Efficiency Table.
The system shall display pagination controls at the bottom of the table.
the system shall display pagination controls.
The system shall allow the user to select the number of rows displayed per page using the “Rows per page” dropdown.   (e.g. 10,20)
select number of rows per page
the user selects rows per page
the system shall update table accordingly.
The system shall allow the user to navigate between pages using pagination navigation arrows.
the system shall move to next/previous page.
The system shall display the current row range and total number of rows in the pagination indicator.
the system shall display current range and total rows.
The system shall maintain consistent formatting of efficiency values and percentages across all operator rows.
the system shall maintain consistent formatting of percentages and values.
The system shall display a panel titled “MHE Efficiency Table” within the Efficiency Analytics module.
the system shall display “MHE Efficiency Table”.
The system shall display a subtitle describing the section as “Machine performance and energy metrics”
the system shall display “Machine performance and energy metrics”.
The system shall display a table containing efficiency performance data for MHE assets.
see a table of MHE data
the system shall display a table.
The system shall display the following columns in the MHE Efficiency Table: MHE, Pallets Per Hour, and Efficiency.
the system shall display columns: MHE, Pallets Per Hour, Efficiency.
The system shall display the MHE identifier in the MHE column for each equipment record.
the system shall display MHE identifiers.
The system shall display an icon representing the MHE asset type alongside the MHE identifier.
I can visually identify equipment type
the system shall display an icon alongside MHE identifier.
The system shall display the pallet movement productivity value in the Pallets Per Hour column for each MHE.
the MHE Efficiency Table is displayed
the user views the Pallets Per Hour column
the system shall display pallet movement productivity value.
The system shall display the efficiency percentage for each MHE within the Efficiency column.
the user views the Efficiency column
the system shall display efficiency percentage.
The system shall present the efficiency value using a visual status badge to highlight the efficiency percentage.
the system shall display a visual status badge.
The system shall display each MHE asset as a separate row within the table.
each MHE as a separate row
the system shall display each MHE as a row.
The system shall maintain consistent formatting for numeric productivity values and percentage efficiency values across all rows.
the system shall maintain consistent formatting.
The system shall display a refresh icon in the top-right corner of the MHE Efficiency Table panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the MHE efficiency data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload MHE efficiency data.
The system shall dynamically update the MHE Efficiency Table when refreshed analytics data is retrieved.
the system shall update the MHE Efficiency Table.
The system shall display pagination controls at the bottom of the table.
the system shall display pagination controls.
The system shall allow the user to select the number of rows displayed per page using the “Rows per page” dropdown.
the system shall update displayed rows.
The system shall allow the user to navigate between pages using pagination navigation arrows.
the system shall navigate between pages.
The system shall display the current range of rows and total number of MHE records in the pagination indicator.
the system shall display current range and total records.
The system shall ensure that pagination dynamically updates the table content when the user changes the page or row count.
user changes page or row count
the system shall update table content dynamically.
The system shall display a panel titled “Zone-to-Zone Pallet Flow Matrix” within the Fleet Efficiency analytics dashboard.
the system shall display “Zone-to-Zone Pallet Flow Matrix” panel.
The system shall display a matrix visualization representing pallet movement between warehouse zones.
the system shall display matrix visualization.
The system shall display origin zones as rows and destination zones as columns within the matrix.
the system shall display origin as rows and destination as columns.
The system shall display zone labels such as Dock, Office, Zone A, Zone B, and Zone C along both axes of the matrix.
the system shall display labels like Dock, Office, Zone A, Zone B, Zone C.
The system shall display the vertical Y axis labelled “Origin Zone.”
the system shall label Y-axis as “Origin Zone”.
The system shall display the horizontal X axis labelled “Destination Zone.”
the system shall label X-axis as “Destination Zone”.
The system shall populate each matrix cell with the number of pallets moved between the corresponding origin and destination zones.
the system shall populate each cell with pallet counts.
The system shall display a value of zero in cells where no pallet movement is recorded between the respective zones.
see zero where no data exists
The system shall visually represent pallet flow intensity using colour gradients within the matrix cells.
the system shall use colour gradients.
The system shall display darker shades for cells representing higher pallet movement volumes.
the system shall display darker shades.
The system shall display lighter shades for cells representing lower pallet movement volumes.
the system shall display lighter shades.
The system shall update the matrix visualization dynamically based on zone-to-zone pallet movement data retrieved from the analytics data source.
the system shall update matrix visualization.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over a matrix cell.
The system shall display the origin zone and destination zone in the tooltip.
the system shall display origin and destination zones.
The system shall display the total number of pallets moved between the selected zones in the tooltip.
the system shall display pallet count.
The system shall display the Average pallet movement time between the selected zones in the tooltip.
the system shall display average pallet movement time.
The system shall visually highlight the selected matrix cell when the user hovers over it.
the system shall highlight the selected cell.
The system shall display the tooltip near the hovered cell without obstructing surrounding matrix data.
the system shall position tooltip without obstruction.
The system shall display a refresh icon in the top-right corner of the Zone-to-Zone Pallet Flow Matrix panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the pallet flow data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload pallet flow data.
The system shall dynamically update the matrix visualization when refreshed pallet flow data is retrieved.
the system shall update matrix visualization.
